◎简　　介  

　　《美厨竞赛 澳大利亚版》是澳大利亚Ten电视台的一档真人秀节目，基于英国版《美厨竞赛》发展而来。食品评论家Matt Preston，大厨George Calombaris和Gary Mehigan担任节目的主持及裁判。(文：life_is_good@YDY)MasterChef Australia is an Australian competitive cooking game show based on the original British version of MasterChef. It is produced by FremantleMedia Australia and screens on Network Ten. Food critic Matt Preston, chef George Calombaris, and rest...
